notes: Pilot/passenger seating blocks. Cockpit 1.5 m is the canopy-enclosed pilot seat that also refills suit resources. Control Seat 2.5 m is an interior-use piloting station with multi-screen displays. Seat 1.5 m is currently a placeholder — the wiki explicitly says 'does not have any functionality yet; will be added in a later vertical slice', so it is marked gameStatus='planned'. Every entry reports power.maxInput=0; almost certainly a wiki omission (displays and life-support need power).

resources.description: Enclosed canopy cockpit used for piloting and managing grid functions. The canopy refills the occupying Space Engineer's suit resources (oxygen, fuel, energy).
resources.unlock: Unlocked by default in all survival worlds

resources.description: Interior piloting station used for managing grid functions. Features multiple screens; mostly used in interior spaces (no enclosed canopy).
resources.unlock: Unlocked by default in all survival worlds

resources.description: Passenger seat (no piloting). Currently a placeholder — functionality not yet implemented in the current vertical slice.
resources.unlock: Unlocked by default in all survival worlds
dataGaps: functionality (wiki: 'does not have any functionality yet; will be added in a later vertical slice')
